thinking.text:
Let me look at the relevant information about referral bonuses.

From the search results, I can see important information:

1. **Weekly Limit**: You can earn referral bonuses for up to 2 successful referrals per week. This is calculated on a rolling 7-day basis. If you've already had 2 referrals complete in the past week, any additional referrals won't qualify for a bonus.

2. The user says they got 4 friends to sign up but only received bonuses for 2 of them. This could be because of the weekly limit (max 2 per rolling 7-day window) or because some friends haven't met the qualifying spend requirement yet.

Let me first ask the user about their account so I can look into this further. But first, I need to verify their identity since I'll need to access their information.

Let me ask them for their details.

worker_attempts.visible_answer:
Hello! I'd be happy to help you look into your referral bonuses. Before I can access your account details and check on the status of your referrals, I'll need to verify your identity first.

Could you please provide me with your **full name** and **user ID** so I can get started? I'll also need to confirm a couple of details to verify your identity.
